subject: FREE home delivery of your favourite McDonald’s® food!

 Now free home delivery via Deliveroo!

Hello Denys,

Sometimes, there’s nothing better than a chill night at home. Especially if you don't have to leave the house to enjoy *your favourite McDonald's ® food*. Even better: a *Deliveroo* courier now even delivers it at your doorstep *for free*!*

Perfect for an evening of binge-watching. Or for when you have friends over and want to keep the good vibes going. Or for when you don't feel like cooking. For whatever reason... have your order of at least 15 euros delivered at home for free *until May 3 rd , 2026*.

Enjoy!
*Your McDonald’s ® crew* 

 Order now! ( https://url2866.mcdonalds.be/ls/click?upn=u001.5b9bm8MQyEOFtw4g9aFjVMJ6hNpjLX3ipWpkWsWIMCXvNUa2qbyWDUl6kLvEGBnls2PEqPukaPIW0-2BE9A6xMgaNbGgZYdR6Rlng2PN4-2BH7xZyGEduSN8-2BKT5w53AMejeP0gshe1Mc12ci-2FBQtMPqJPyM-2Fj-2FDFQ8N3amT8r9hTpCYEX4Hje-2FzNLIg1x2s6AoeSmEX_1QnDvVxXkBjpBZebjrr8-2B8CHvou-2Frm5QRozFsrfQaMqtyb4BchlGBZcDbLhwoy0ZOjg0mprKZ-2FL1Kg2CNCjJ2KoGumN8ZTmI2s6Ha4gw28giUnQAbLdD-2F5PXEC5XcaewzNlvDgxbyvbnj-2FkHR-2BdMG-2F6-2BXvs6SAy4465iXNgHrlxnxqKP-2F3FOxpoOn5Opy4lCz5cpA5fNoDKrQO94X5q2-2BW-2FCwcVqUZpwMXaBAptvkZjzstD9EuxgF-2FWaoPR-2B8TDG4aDAHaXpiIo-2B75V-2FYw3OqmFA8dhsWouSwFJ75FJeRZKeS11E-2BE-2F2kwQZ1h9ulYb3yA55i2jXnZDCg0RBH-2Fod8j7kNXPvucF6XomehuZ9vJ9HZ-2F6YKO4R7WtR9Fs-2BFiSEM718SdocSKMIGs4oBgsF6QivoAgaCi2VHucExAHgIUgi6pBDTn74SYCAP1v10UbOz7XFf-2FqaohDoLjSHp0GyS4B3kfjN96PA9JPzaFEYiHJllGzqLWaUGIiVRCJgQtcs )
